summary: Polished canvas 9x9 Go board with correct hoshi placement, stones on intersections, solid interaction, confirmed suicide prevention and occupied-point rejection, but no capture was observed in the automated test sequence.
evidence_highlights: Hoshi contrast data confirms darker marks at all five tested 9x9 hoshi positions (P22, P26, P44, P62, P66), each 64–93 brightness units darker than surrounding board pixels
Stone-centering probe shows placed stone at intersection is brighter than midpoints between intersections, confirming stones render on intersection lines not cell centers
Occupied-point scenario: second click on P00 produced 0 pixel change and did not advance the turn — rejection confirmed

White attempted at corner A9 (P00) in capture sequence was blocked while surrounded by Black stones with no liberties, confirming suicide prevention; controls include New Game, Undo, Pass, and capture counts
evidence_gaps: No capture was observed: the capture_probe shows white stone at P11 persisting (brightness delta 1) through the entire 7-move capture-sequence scenario
Ko rule behavior is untested and unconfirmed
External CDN dependencies (Tailwind, Google Fonts) loaded successfully but would break core styling in offline use
